analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: Combined Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ MPNST cohort (n=54) requires external TCGA and DKFZ methylation data that are not bundled in the local data_dir. Only Toronto-cohort GSE207207/GSE207399/GSE207400 files are present; TCGA MPNST and DKFZ reference-class cases are absent, so the Supplementary Figure 1d silhouette-width computation cannot be reproduced.
denominator_used: N = 0 ; definition: combined Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ MPNST cohort (n = 54) not reconstructable locally — TCGA and DKFZ methylation/beta-value inputs are missing from data_dir.
assumptions_made: The 'combined MPNST cohort (n=54)' referenced in Supplementary Figure 1d corresponds to the integrated Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ dataset described in the paper's methods; local data_dir only contains the Toronto GSE207207/GSE207399/GSE207400 series and no TCGA or DKFZ inputs; without all three sources the consensus clustering + silhouette-width computation cannot be reproduced.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Inspected data_dir: /home/klkehl/.../PMC10172395/.../data
   - Files present: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4-10_ESM.xlsx (supplementary tables), GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz, GSE207207_idats/, GSE207207_RAW.tar, GSE207207_series_matrix.txt.gz, GSE207399_10x/, GSE207399_RAW.tar, GSE207399_series_matrix.txt.gz, GSE207400_Matrix.txt.gz, GSE207400_series_matrix.txt.gz, filelist.txt.
   - These correspond to the Toronto cohort (MPNST methylation EPIC arrays, single-nucleus RNA-seq, and ATAC-seq) only.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Question specifies the combined MPNST cohort with n = 54 from Supplementary Figure 1d.
   - Per the paper, this combined cohort integrates Toronto cases with external TCGA MPNST cases and DKFZ reference-class cases.
   - Local data_dir contains Toronto-only methylation/expression data.
   - No TCGA MPNST beta-value matrix, no DKFZ reference set, and no precomputed silhouette-width table are available.
   - Final analytic cohort reproducible locally: 0 of the required 54 external samples available for joint clustering.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Outcome requested: average silhouette width for the combined cohort, as rendered in Supplementary Figure 1d.
   - Required inputs: harmonized beta-value matrix across Toronto+TCGA+DKFZ, probe-set filtering, distance metric, and cluster assignments from ConsensusClusterPlus — all downstream of data that is not present.

D. COMPUTATION
   - Not performed. Cannot assemble the n=54 combined matrix without TCGA and DKFZ methylation data.

E. RESULT
   - DATA_UNAVAILABLE: external TCGA and DKFZ MPNST methylation data are not bundled in data_dir, so the combined-cohort silhouette width from Supplementary Figure 1d cannot be reproduced.

F. CAVEATS
   - Supplementary figure values are not tabulated in the local supplementary Excel files that were checked for presence.
   - If TCGA (e.g., TCGA-SARC MPNST subset) and DKFZ reference methylation data were supplied and harmonized to the EPIC/450K platform used in Toronto, the analysis could be executed with ConsensusClusterPlus + cluster::silhouette in R.
   - Result therefore reported as DATA_UNAVAILABLE per skill contract §9.5.
